title: New observer firmware 1.14 for SenseCap Solar ?

messages.author: Erwin (ON8AR)
messages.text: Is the new observer firmware somewhere available for the SenseCap Solar ? this is tha last I can find : SenseCap_Solar_repeater-1.13.0-letsmesh.net-295f67d.zip And I want to flash my repeater to act like an observer also (Raspberry Pi) Erwin
messages.content_html: Is the new observer firmware somewhere available for the SenseCap Solar ? this is tha last I can find : SenseCap_Solar_repeater-1.13.0-letsmesh.net-295f67d.zip And I want to flash my repeater to act like an observer also (Raspberry Pi) Erwin
